# 质量评分模型 (quality_model)

> 10 000 次 Monte Carlo 模拟，按 `need.md §6.1` 7 维评分 + `§6.3` 修复闭环。

## 1. 7 维权重

| 维度 | 权重 |
| --- | --- |
| structure | 0.1800 |
| style | 0.2000 |
| detail | 0.1200 |
| clarity | 0.1000 |
| color | 0.1000 |
| no_deform | 0.1800 |
| intent | 0.1200 |

## 2. 各维度基线分布 (μ, σ)

| 维度 | μ | σ |
| --- | --- | --- |
| structure | 8.30 | 0.9000 |
| style | 8.70 | 0.7000 |
| detail | 7.90 | 1.10 |
| clarity | 8.40 | 0.8000 |
| color | 8.50 | 0.7000 |
| no_deform | 7.60 | 1.40 |
| intent | 8.10 | 1.00 |

## 3. 基线结果 (max_iter=2, threshold=7.0)

| 指标 | 值 |
| --- | --- |
| pass_rate_by_iter=0 | 39.0% |
| pass_rate_by_iter=1 | 74.7% |
| pass_rate_by_iter=2 | 91.6% |
| expected_iter_per_shot | 0.8668 |
| shot_overall_mean | 8.42 |
| shot_overall_p10 | 8.04 |
| shot_overall_p90 | 8.80 |
| project_pass_probability (160 shots) | 0.00% |

## 4. 阈值灵敏度

| pass_threshold | shot_pass_rate |
| --- | --- |
| 6.5 | 98.1% |
| 7.0 | 91.5% |
| 7.5 | 70.8% |
| 8.0 | 32.3% |

| --- | --- |
| 0 | 38.5% |
| 1 | 74.9% |
| 2 | 91.5% |
| 3 | 97.9% |
| 4 | 99.5% |
